caption: The video begins with a static image displaying the logo and contact information for Tiger Real Estate LLC. The background is a gradient of blue and purple hues, creating a visually appealing and professional look. The text "TIGER REAL ESTATE LLC" is prominently featured in bold, black letters at the top, while the phone number "727-329-8322" is clearly visible below it. There is no movement or change in the scene throughout the frames, suggesting that this segment of the video is likely an introductory or closing screen designed to provide viewers with essential contact details for the real estate company. The consistent and unchanging nature of the frames emphasizes the importance of the information being presented.
